title: CodeModificationPlan
description: Structural mapping from test-strategy.md test cases to the SUT's existing code. Produced by Step 7 (test-architect) and consumed by Step 8 (TDD codegen). Authoritative for placement decisions (which fixtures to reuse, where new POM methods go, what TBD intents to emit). The writer agent transpiles the plan into code; it does not redo placement reasoning.

test_file_target.description: SUT-relative or absolute path where the worca-prefixed test file lands. Must match the active module's test_directory_layout convention.

from.description: Required when source=reuse. File:symbol pointer from sut_inventory (e.g. tests/conftest.py:auth_session).

at.description: Required when source=create. SUT-relative file path where the new fixture lands.

reuse_justification.description: Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming the matching dimension that justifies reusing this fixture (e.g. 'yields Page already authenticated as admin').

from.description: Required when source=reuse. SUT-relative file path of the existing POM class.

at.description: Required when source=create. SUT-relative file path where the new POM lands.

missing_methods.description: Methods that the test cases need but don't exist on the (reused or created) POM. The codegen step adds these to the POM file with the given signatures.

reuse_justification.description: Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming the matching dimension (e.g. 'ChatPage already models the side-nav route this TC exercises').
Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming why this helper fits (matching signature, side-effect-free, etc).

name.description: The locator constant name (e.g. LOGIN_BUTTON). Used as the symbol the writer agent imports or declares.

owning_page.description: Name of the POM class that owns this locator (cross-references page_objects[].name).

from.description: Required when source=reuse. SUT-relative file path of the existing locator constant.

intent.description: Required when source=create_tbd. Semantic intent string used by the JIT resolver at runtime. Prefer visible role+label (e.g. 'sign in button').

reuse_justification.description: Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming why this locator constant fits (matching selector intent, owning-page coherence).
